title: Add native_sim UDP/CoAP post-injection observer
description: Review follow-up from project-LICHEN-kxbj: the native_sim L2 packet-path gate proves LICHEN_L2 TX -> LoRa loopback -> RX -> net_recv_data injection with exact IPv6/ICMPv6 bytes, but intentionally does not prove post-IP UDP/CoAP application delivery. Add a higher-layer native_sim observer using UDP/CoAP or sockets once the stack path can send without bypassing route/ND constraints, and assert the app-level payload is accepted after net_recv_data.
notes:
Implemented native_sim UDP post-injection observer in lichen/tests/ping_l2: enabled CONFIG_NET_UDP, CONFIG_NET_SOCKETS, CONFIG_NET_CONTEXT_RCVTIMEO, CONFIG_POSIX_API; added checksum-correct IPv6/UDP packet carrying CoAP-shaped payload 50 02 4c 32 ff 6f 6b; binds a Zephyr UDP socket to the node link-local address and test port; sends the packet through the real LICHEN_L2 send path; asserts zsock_recvfrom() receives exact payload bytes; separately asserts L2 TX -> LoRa loopback -> RX -> net_recv_data captured the exact IPv6/UDP packet bytes.

Review evidence:
- Kuhn the 2nd initial review found P1: SO_RCVTIMEO requires CONFIG_NET_CONTEXT_RCVTIMEO; fixed in prj.conf. Also checked UDP checksum and false-pass risk.
- Hume the 2nd initial review found same P1 plus P3 socket cleanup; fixed by enabling CONFIG_NET_CONTEXT_RCVTIMEO and making recv_udp_observer return errors so test closes socket before assertions.
- Mendel the 2nd fixed-diff review: no P0/P1/P2; confirmed timeout config and cleanup fixes.
- Fermat the 2nd fixed-diff review: no P0/P1/P2; confirmed test proves post-net_recv_data UDP socket delivery. Scope note: payload is CoAP-looking bytes over UDP, not parsed by Zephyr CoAP library; this matches Bead target (UDP/CoAP or sockets).

Validation evidence:
- Local: git diff --check passed on 2026-07-01.
- EC2 builder i-05e27e074db786e22 in us-east-2a, EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr, bootstrap-host.sh run. /mnt/lichen-zephyr/scripts/aws-builder-user-data.sh was present after mount, but not locally available before launch because the volume was detached; manual launch + post-mount bootstrap used.
- Primary EBS worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN was dirty and behind origin/main, so preserved it and validated in clean clone /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-ev5b12 at base 882d2a418685fe563ace618c8178a78c1c844c22 with only this two-file patch applied.
- EC2 command: west build -p always -b native_sim /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-ev5b12/lichen/tests/ping_l2 -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-ev5b12/build/ping_l2-native-ev5b12 -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-ev5b12/lichen && west build -d /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-ev5b12/build/ping_l2-native-ev5b12 -t run. Result: PASS, testsuite ping_l2 pass=2 fail=0 skip=0 total=2; new test_udp_payload_reaches_socket_after_l2_injection passed.
- EC2 Twister command: west twister -T /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-ev5b12/lichen/tests/ping_l2 -p native_sim --inline-logs --verbose --outdir /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-ev5b12/twister-out-ev5b12 --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=/mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-ev5b12/lichen. Result: PASS, 1/1 configuration passed, 2 test cases executed, 0 skipped, 0 warnings, duration 163.69s.
- Notable non-fatal warnings during validation: native_sim startup logs eth_posix Cannot create zeth (0); two early LICHEN_L2 TX frame build failed invalid argument (-22) before ztest suite start; Twister emitted pkg_resources deprecation warning from Zephyr 3.7 environment loader. Targeted suite still completed PROJECT EXECUTION SUCCESSFUL.
close_reason: Completed: native_sim ping_l2 now includes a UDP socket observer proving CoAP-shaped UDP payload delivery after L2 RX injection/net_recv_data; local diff hygiene passed; EC2 native_sim west build/run passed 2/2; EC2 Twister passed 1/1 with both test cases; four review passes completed with P1/P3 findings fixed and final two reviews clean.
